task_completion.description: Verify successful login to NOSH ChartingSystem
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating the agent successfully logged in as demo_provider.

task_completion.description: Verify Margaret Thompson's chart is accessed
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart for 'Margaret Thompson' is open. Look for her name and DOB (1958-04-22) in the patient header or active workspace.

task_completion.description: Verify the laboratory order entry screen is open
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Orders', 'Laboratory', or 'Add Lab' entry form/modal is open within Margaret Thompson's chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct test (CMP) is selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Comprehensive Metabolic Panel' or 'CMP' is entered, selected, or visible in the test name/order field.

task_completion.description: Verify the clinical note/indication is entered
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Monitoring type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease stage 3' is typed into the clinical note, indication, reason, or comments field of the order form.

task_completion.description: Verify the lab order is saved or submitted
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence that the order was finalized, such as clicking a 'Save', 'Sign', or 'Submit' button, a success notification, or the CMP order appearing in the patient's list of active orders/encounters.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the NOSH ChartingSystem interface, not terminal commands (like curl) making API requests.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen using a terminal to run SQL commands (e.g., mysql, sqlite3) to manually insert the order into the database.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual EHR application
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs (test name, clinical note) must be entered into the actual NOSH web interface, not typed into a text editor, notepad, or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Margaret Thompson (DOB: 1958-04-22). Expected Order Type: Laboratory. Expected Test: 'Comprehensive Metabolic Panel' or 'CMP'. Expected Clinical Note/Indication must include keywords related to 'diabetes', 'kidney', or 'ckd' (specifically 'Monitoring type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease stage 3'). NOSH ChartingSystem is a web-based EHR.
